Our Story

It all started with
our three kids.

We're an American, Jamaican, Peruvian, and German family raising three kids born into sports — courts, fields, mats, and sidelines from day one. Every design in the store started with one of them: a stage, a personality, an era worth keeping. We turned those moments into pieces, and the pieces became a store.

But these designs were never just about our three. Every kid has a stage worth celebrating — on a tee, a mug, a print, or whatever fits your life. Find the one that's yours, or order custom and we'll capture your kid the same way we captured ours.

Made to Order · Our Most Personal Product

The Kid
Personality Poster.

Tell us who your child really is — their sports, their obsessions, their funniest traits, their world. Send us a photo. We illustrate them in our signature style with everything that makes them them.

You receive three completely different concepts and choose your favourite. Nothing gets finalised until you say so.

Digital file Printed poster Framed On a tee Canvas

Ka'hlani · Totiana · Omarie — the originals. Yours is next.

Custom Orders

Anything in the store,
made just for you.

Love a design but want your kid's name on it? Want your family photo illustrated on a canvas, mug, or tee? Tell us what you're imagining and we'll make it real.

i.

Tell us your idea

A name, a photo, a design from scratch. Send a message and photo.

ii.

We design it

Real likenesses, real details. Hair, glasses, the dog, all of it.

iii.

You approve first

Nothing gets made until you've seen it and said yes.

iv.

Delivered your way

Digital in days, or on a poster, canvas, mug, tee, or phone case.

Our promise: if you don't love what we make, we revise it until you do — or full refund. No questions asked.
